panel_membership_resolution.label: Fee earner is on Resolution Accredited Specialist Panel

panel_membership_children.label: Fee earner is on Law Society Children Panel (and work relates to children)

s1_cse_detailed_knowledge.label: Unusually detailed knowledge demonstrated
s1_cse_detailed_knowledge.explanation: Required detailed knowledge of recent FPR amendments and the interaction with section 38(6) Children Act assessments. The local authority's interpretation conflicted with the line of authority from Re B-S (Children) [2013] EWCA Civ 1146, which I had to argue should govern.
s1_cse_detailed_knowledge.categoryTitle: LAA Threshold Test: Exceptional Competence, Skill, or Expertise

s1_cse_marshalling_evidence.label: Unusual skill in marshalling evidence
s1_cse_marshalling_evidence.explanation: Reviewed and indexed approximately 1,400 pages of social services records spanning eight years across two local authority areas, distilling the chronology of safeguarding concerns into a 12-page Scott Schedule for the threshold hearing.
s1_cse_marshalling_evidence.categoryTitle: LAA Threshold Test: Exceptional Competence, Skill, or Expertise

s1_circ_expert_evidence.label: Complex questions of expert evidence
s1_circ_expert_evidence.explanation: Three expert reports were obtained — paediatric, adult psychiatric, and ISW — with materially conflicting opinions on the mother's capacity to safely parent. The reports required cross-referencing and reconciliation before any meaningful negotiation could take place.
s1_circ_expert_evidence.categoryTitle: LAA Threshold Test: Exceptional Circumstances, Novelty, Weight, or Complexity

s2_resp_no_counsel_drafting.label: Complex drafting (without Counsel)
s2_resp_no_counsel_drafting.explanation: Drafted the full position statement, the Scott Schedule, and the section 7 response without recourse to Counsel, all settled in advance of the case management hearing.
s2_resp_no_counsel_drafting.categoryTitle: Determining Level of Enhancement: Degree of Responsibility

s2_cse_care_vulnerable_client.label: Particular care with vulnerable client
s2_cse_care_vulnerable_client.explanation: Client has diagnosed PTSD and a learning disability assessed at borderline range. Conducted instructions across six shorter attendances, used plain-language summaries, and brought an intermediary to the FHDRA.
s2_cse_care_vulnerable_client.categoryTitle: Determining Level of Enhancement: Care, Speed & Economy
